content.text:
Implemented support for user-implemented generic mapping methods.

What changed:
- Generic user-implemented methods are now discovered instead of rejected.
- Added a new `UserImplementedGenericTypeMapping` to emit closed generic method invocations such as:
  ```csharp
  MapOptional<global::User, global::UserDto>(source.ModifiedBy)
  ```
- Added generic type inference support for mappings where some generic type parameters can only be inferred from the target type.
- Mapping lookup now attempts generic user mappings when no exact mapping is found.
- Open generic user mappings are excluded from runtime target type switch content mappings until closed for a concrete source/target pair.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the issue.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix and passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test afterward as requested.
- Re-ran:
  ```bash
  dotnet test /testbed/test/Riok.Mapperly.Tests/Riok.Mapperly.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~GenericTest"
  ```
  Result: Passed, 38/38.

No commits were made.
